projectDescription: A collection of open-source skills that extend AI coding agents (like Claude Code) with real-world capabilities powered by the Pika Developer API.
keyFeatures: Self-contained skill modules with SKILL.md definitions for AI agent auto-detection
Real-time AI avatar joining Google Meet and Zoom calls via PikaStreaming
Voice cloning from short audio recordings
AI avatar generation via OpenAI image models
Automatic billing and credit management with checkout flow
Context-aware conversation using workspace memory and identity files
Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, and other AI coding agents
